banner.title: Upholstery Cleaning Service
banner.description: Renew your furniture with bEasy's upholstery cleaning - we remove stains, dust, and allergens for a fresher home.

taskInfo.title: What is Upholstery Cleaning?
taskInfo.description: Upholstery cleaning is the process of removing dirt, stains, allergens, and other contaminants from upholstered furniture such as sofas, chairs, and mattresses. Over time, upholstery can accumulate dust, pet dander, food spills, and other debris that can affect the appearance and hygiene of your furniture. Professional upholstery cleaning services use specialized equipment and cleaning solutions to deep clean and refresh your furniture, helping to extend its lifespan and improve indoor air quality.
taskInfo.subtitle: Information of procedure

items: Spray specialized cleaning solution on all sofa surfaces
Use scrubber to remove stains and grime
